rationale: The plan introduces three new leaf modules (trackList, analyser, player) under src/audio/ with a single integration point in main.ts. The audio graph design (source→AnalyserNode→GainNode→destination) correctly ensures analysis data flows while muted. The only modification to existing code is a non-blocking addition to main.ts, which currently only fetches geo hints. No existing modules are restructured. All new files align with the recommended module split in CLAUDE.md. Dependencies are limited to built-in Web Audio API—no new packages required.
concerns: Step 8 (placeholder audio) creates a minimal silent mp3—verify the generated file is a valid mp3 that browsers can decode without errors, as malformed files could cause MediaElementSource failures
The plan notes US-014/US-015 have no implementation despite being marked pass—trackList.ts covers this, but the coupling means this ticket implicitly delivers two prior stories' code
